prd.user_story: As a developer, I want to: Find all Java source files in apache/kafka that implement the network layer: the Selector (NIO-based), the Processor threads, the Acceptor thread, the RequestChannel handoff, and the NetworkReceive/NetworkSend byte buffer management.
constraints: Provide specific file paths and repository names in your answer.
prd.success_definition: Agent successfully identifies relevant files and symbols across all repos in the apache-kafka-ecosystem fixture.
prd.seed_prompt: Find all Java source files in apache/kafka that implement the network layer: the Selector (NIO-based), the Processor threads, the Acceptor thread, the RequestChannel handoff, and the NetworkReceive/NetworkSend byte buffer management.
